---
title: "Diffusive Latent Generation"
subtitle: "Placeholder single-page writeup"
author: "Nicholas (Xingjian) Lyu"
date: last-modified
title-block-banner: false
---

# Abstract

Replace this with a short abstract.

# Motivation

Replace this with the problem statement and motivation.

# Method

Replace this with the method overview.

# Theory

Replace this with the key equations and claims.

# Implementation

Replace this with the mapping to the codebase.

# Experiments

Replace this with results, figures, and comparisons.

# References

Replace this with citations or links.
